query: Show me monthly average of day-ahead prices for ERCOT Houston hub in 2023 based on your ERCOT database
final_answer:
Monthly average **day-ahead** prices for **ERCOT Houston Hub** in **2023** (avg of hourly DAM LMPs, **$/MWh**):

| Month (2023) | Avg DAM price ($/MWh) |
|---|---:|
| 2023-01 | 24.85 |
| 2023-02 | 21.92 |
| 2023-03 | 26.45 |
| 2023-04 | 25.37 |
| 2023-05 | 30.94 |
| 2023-06 | 74.60 |
| 2023-07 | 58.10 |
| 2023-08 | 265.07 |
| 2023-09 | 69.91 |
| 2023-10 | 34.33 |
| 2023-11 | 31.16 |
| 2023-12 | 20.46 |

Source: `ercot_db.public.ercot_lmp` filtered to `zone_name='houston'`, `zone_type='hub'`, `is_day_ahead=true`, timestamps in calendar year 2023.

steps.content:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "database": "ercot_db",
    "table": "ercot_lmp",
    "description": "This table contains the locational marginal price of electricity in each hub and load zone within the ERCOT market. The timestamp column contains the timestamps associated with the prices. The utc_timestamp, invariant of daylight savings, contains the utc timestamps associated with the price. The 'zone_name' column contains the zone names. The 'zone_type' column reflects if the corresponding zone is a generation zone/hub or if it is a load zone. The default prices to provide will be by generation zone/hub. However, if a user specifically asks for prices by load zone, the load zone type is used based on filters applied to the 'zone_type' column. The 'lmp' column contains the resultant energy prices in $/MWh. The 'Is_day_ahead' column reflects if the price data is for the day-ahead energy market or the real-time energy market.",

tool_input.query:
SELECT date_trunc('month', timestamp)::date AS month,
       AVG(lmp) AS avg_dam_lmp_usd_per_mwh
FROM ercot_lmp
WHERE zone_name = 'houston'
  AND zone_type = 'hub'
  AND is_day_ahead = true
  AND timestamp >= '2023-01-01'::timestamp
  AND timestamp <  '2024-01-01'::timestamp
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

steps.content:
{
  "success": true,
  "data": {
    "database": "ercot_db",
    "query": "SELECT date_trunc('month', timestamp)::date AS month,\n       AVG(lmp) AS avg_dam_lmp_usd_per_mwh\nFROM ercot_lmp\nWHERE zone_name = 'houston'\n  AND zone_type = 'hub'\n  AND is_day_ahead = true\n  AND timestamp >= '2023-01-01'::timestamp\n  AND timestamp <  '2024-01-01'::timestamp\nGROUP BY 1\nORDER BY 1",
    "execution_plan": [
      "GroupAggregate  (cost=85380.74..85556.62 rows=7012 width=12)",
      "  Group Key: ((date_trunc('month'::text, \"timestamp\"))::date)",
      "  ->  Sort  (cost=85380.74..85398.46 rows=7090 width=12)",
      "        Sort Key: ((date_trunc('month'::text, \"timestamp\"))::date)",
      "        ->  Bitmap Heap Scan on ercot_lmp  (cost=31944.34..84927.28 rows=7090 width=12)",
      "              Recheck Cond: ((\"timestamp\" >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (\"timestamp\" < '2024-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND ((zone_name)::text = 'houston'::text) AND is_day_ahead)",
      "              Filter: ((zone_type)::text = 'hub'::text)",
      "              ->  BitmapAnd  (cost=31944.34..31944.34 rows=19301 width=0)",
      "                    ->  Bitmap Index Scan on ix_lmp_timestamp_zone  (cost=0.00..14526.76 rows=96604 width=0)",
      "                          Index Cond: ((\"timestamp\" >= '2023-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (\"timestamp\" < '2024-01-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND ((zone_name)::text = 'houston'::text))",
      "                    ->  Bitmap Index Scan on ix_lmp_day_ahead  (cost=0.00..17413.78 rows=1599647 width=0)",
      "                          Index Cond: (is_day_ahead = true)"
    ],
    "has_seq_scan": false,
    "warning": null
  },
  "error": null,
  "metadata": {}
}

tool_input.query:
SELECT date_trunc('month', timestamp)::date AS month,
       AVG(lmp) AS avg_dam_lmp_usd_per_mwh
FROM ercot_lmp
WHERE zone_name = 'houston'
  AND zone_type = 'hub'
  AND is_day_ahead = true
  AND timestamp >= '2023-01-01'::timestamp
  AND timestamp <  '2024-01-01'::timestamp
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;
